name: jira
description: Jira discovery and triage workflows: investigate one task read-only or triage a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.

interface.longDescription: Investigates one Jira task into a ready-to-copy implementation brief, or triages a bounded board into reviewed Bitbucket pull requests.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $jira:discovery to investigate this Jira task and write a ready-to-copy artifact.
